must_detect.matched_text:
Operational Incident Report — Isla Meridian Holdings, Inc. (PSE-listed), 18 July 2026.
Summary: brief outage of third-party SFTP gateway used by Payroll and Investor Relations; services were restored within 49 minutes.
Vendor: Cordillera Data Services OPC (service location: Taguig; DR node: Jurong, SG) under Data Processing Agreement Schedule 2 (Security Controls).
No personal data under the Data Privacy Act was exfiltrated; the files queued contained only test employee headers and masked account fields (e.g., Account No: XX-XXXX-1234).
No MNPI within the meaning of the SRC was present; prior updates on the IR calendar were already publicly posted via SEC Form 17-C and PSE EDGE.
Data subject request: one HR deletion request was COMPLETED on 16 July 2026 for employee code E-004512 per Erasure Ticket ER-26-0716.
Cross-border transfer: no new export was initiated during the incident, and existing approval DEX-2025-04 remains in effect with standard contractual clauses annexed.
Retention and minimisation: per Records Schedule HR-3.2, only fields strictly necessary for payroll routing (Employee No., bank code, masked account suffix) are retained; no retention expiry was breached.
Consent management: no consent withdrawals were logged this period; the HR onboarding form (Rev. 2026-01) continues to operate with layered notices and unticked boxes by default.
Security: NPC breach thresholds were not triggered; internal review indicates the SFTP retry logic queued encrypted blobs (AES-256) with rotating keys; no credentials were compromised.
must_detect.reason: promoted from strict runtime finding during Stage B baseline reconciliation
